product_overview: DQCR Studio is a single-page file-first IDE for creating, editing, validating and building DQCR projects. It provides a Project Hub for project lifecycle actions and a Workbench with tabs for model, SQL, lineage, validation and build workflows.
core_goals: Provide a hub-first UX to browse, create, import, edit and open projects.
Offer an integrated workbench to navigate project contexts and switch between project tools (project info, model editor, SQL editor, lineage, validate, build, admin).
Enable file-first editing of models and SQL with synchronized YAML/visual modes and metadata-assisted autocomplete.
Support framework-driven validation and build workflows with progress streaming and artifact browsing.
Keep project metadata and file operations consistent with workflow cache invalidation and minimal friction for common quick fixes.

features.name: Project Hub
features.description: Browse and manage projects: view lists or cards, filter and search, create/import projects, edit metadata, delete and open projects into the workbench.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View projects in grid mode -> Filter projects by entering search text -> Click Create New Project -> Fill Project ID field -> Fill Name and Description fields -> Click Create button -> See new project appear in the list -> Click Open on new project card -> See workbench open for the selected project

Navigate to / -> View projects in list mode -> Click Import project -> Upload project archive -> Fill import metadata -> Click Import -> See import success toast -> Click Open on imported project -> See workbench open for the imported project

Navigate to / -> View projects -> Click Create New Project -> Fill Project ID with an existing id -> Click Create -> See error 'Project ID already exists' toast -> Click Cancel in create modal -> Click Import instead -> Upload archive -> See import failure 'Invalid project structure' toast

features.name: Project Info
features.description: Inspect and edit project-level metadata (project.yml) and view aggregated project summary such as counts, tags and cache status.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Open on project card -> Click Project Info tab in TabBar -> See aggregated project summary and project.yml preview -> Click Edit metadata -> Change Description field -> Click Save -> See 'Saved' toast and updated project summary
Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Project Info tab -> Click Edit metadata -> Modify tags and visibility -> Click Save -> See project card updated in Hub on next refresh
Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Project Info tab -> Click Edit metadata -> Enter invalid visibility value -> Click Save -> See server validation error message and save is blocked

features.name: Project Workspace Navigation
features.description: Open a project and navigate the workbench: select active project and context, switch workspace tabs, and toggle UI/theme/role controls.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Open on project card -> See workbench top bar with active project -> Select active project from TopBar dropdown -> Choose context 'default' from Context selector -> Click Model tab in TabBar -> See Model Editor screen load for active project
Navigate to / -> Open project -> Use TopBar to enable multi-context mode -> Select two contexts -> Switch to SQL tab -> See SQL editor ready with selected contexts reflected in metadata panel
Navigate to / -> Open project -> Select a context that does not exist in project contexts -> See 'Context unavailable' error toast -> TopBar remains on previous valid context

features.name: SQL Editor
features.description: Open SQL files from the project tree, edit SQL in the Monaco-based editor, use metadata/CTE/parameter inspectors and save or render prepared vs rendered views.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click SQL tab in TabBar -> Open file tree in Sidebar -> Click SQL file '001_main.sql' -> Editor opens file content -> Edit SQL text -> Press Save (Ctrl+S) -> See 'Saved' toast -> Click Render view -> See rendered SQL in preview panel
Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click SQL tab -> Open SQL file -> Use right-side metadata panel to view Priority Chain -> Click an object in the panel -> Editor highlights referenced object in SQL

Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click SQL tab -> Click SQL file that backend returns empty content for -> Editor shows empty content placeholder -> Type changes and attempt to Save -> See error 'Failed to save file' toast due to API error -> Editor keeps unsaved changes and shows error indicator

features.name: Model Editor
features.description: View and edit model structure in both visual and YAML modes, modify target table and fields, and import fields from the catalog into the model.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Model tab in TabBar -> Select model 'Sales' from model selector -> Click Visual mode -> Edit target_table name -> Add new field 'customer_id' using Add Field action -> Click Import fields from catalog -> Select entity in import modal -> Confirm import -> Click Save -> See 'Saved' toast
Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Model tab -> Select model -> Switch to YAML mode -> Make edits to model.yml -> Click Save -> See YAML sync apply and visual mode updated accordingly

Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Model tab -> Select model -> Switch to YAML mode -> Introduce malformed YAML syntax -> Click Save -> See YAML validation error blocking save and visual mode unchanged

features.name: Lineage View
features.description: Inspect model lineage as a DAG with nodes and edges, view node details and summary counters, and navigate from lineage nodes to related SQL assets.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Lineage tab in TabBar -> Select model 'Sales' -> View graph layout and summary counters -> Click node 'stage_01' -> Detail panel opens showing node metadata -> Click 'Open related SQL' -> SQL Editor opens the related SQL file

Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Lineage tab -> Use search to find node by name -> Click found node -> Detail panel opens -> Click 'Navigate to asset' -> Editor or Model screen opens the target asset

Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Lineage tab -> Select model with missing workflow cache -> See 'workflow cache missing' badge in UI -> Click Rebuild workflow -> Rebuild returns error 'framework CLI failed' -> See error toast and rebuild status 'error'

features.name: Validation
features.description: Run project validation, view grouped issues by severity/category, inspect rule details and preview or apply suggested quick fixes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Validate button in TopBar -> Select rule categories and severity filters -> Click Run Validation -> See progress indicator -> Receive results grouped by severity -> Click an error item -> QuickFix Preview modal opens -> Apply quick fix 'add_field' -> See fix applied in editor and validation result updated
Navigate to / -> Open project -> Open Validate tab in TabBar -> View validation history -> Click a previous run -> See run details and linked file locations

Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Validate -> Click Run Validation -> WebSocket reports an error during run -> See 'Validation failed' message and error details in history -> Open QuickFix Preview and see no fixes available for the failure

features.name: Build Workflow
features.description: Run build generation for a project or model, select workflow engine and context, track build progress via streaming logs, inspect generated artifacts and download outputs.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Build tab in TabBar -> Select engine 'dqcr' and context 'default' -> Click Run Build -> See build progress indicator and streamed logs -> On completion see generated artifacts list -> Click Download ZIP -> ZIP file downloads

Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Build tab -> Select engine 'airflow' -> Click Run Build -> See build progress -> Click history entry for last run -> Open generated files tree -> Click file to view content in viewer

Navigate to / -> Open project -> Click Build tab -> Select engine and click Run Build -> Build fails with framework error -> See 'Build failed' toast -> Open bottom panel logs -> Inspect error output to identify missing template or CLI failure

routes.description: Single-page DQCR Studio application with project hub and project workspace modes.

features.name: Project Hub
features.description: Browse, filter, create, import, edit, delete, and open DQCR projects from the main hub.
user_interactions: View all available projects in grid or list mode.
Filter projects by search, visibility, type, and tags.
Create a new project or import an existing project.
Open a project card to enter the workspace.

features.name: Project Workspace Navigation
features.description: Switch between project information, lineage, model editor, SQL editor, parameters, validation, build, and admin views.
user_interactions: Select an active project from the top bar.
Choose one or more contexts for the opened project.
Switch workspace tabs to move between core project tools.
Toggle theme and user role controls.

features.name: SQL Editor
features.description: Open SQL files from the project tree, edit them, inspect metadata, and save changes.
user_interactions: Open SQL files from the sidebar tree.
Edit SQL content in the Monaco-based editor.
Save changes and switch between prepared and rendered views.
Use metadata and dependency helpers from the side panel.

features.name: Model Editor
features.description: View and edit model structure in visual and YAML modes, including catalog-driven field import.
user_interactions: Open the model editor for the active project.
Switch between visual and YAML representations.
Edit target table and fields.
Import fields from the catalog into the model.

features.name: Lineage View
features.description: Inspect lineage nodes and edges for the active model and navigate from lineage to related SQL.
user_interactions: Open the lineage tab for the selected project and model.
View graph layout, summary counters, and node details.
Select lineage nodes and navigate to related SQL assets.

features.name: Validation
features.description: Run validation for the active project, review grouped issues, and inspect quick fixes.
user_interactions: Start project validation from the top bar or validation screen.
Filter validation results by severity and category.
Inspect rule details and preview suggested fixes.

features.name: Build Workflow
features.description: Run build generation for the active project and inspect generated artifacts and build history.
user_interactions: Open the build screen from the top bar or tab bar.
Select workflow engine and launch build execution.
Review build progress, history, and generated files.
Download build artifacts.

known_limitations.issue: Frontend is a single-route SPA, so tool-based route discovery may miss tab-driven screens unless the workspace is opened and navigated manually.
known_limitations.impact: Automated planning tools need to treat tabs and modals as feature entry points instead of standalone routes.

known_limitations.issue: Frontend API client assumes same-origin /api/v1 without a Vite dev proxy.
known_limitations.impact: Running the frontend outside nginx or without matching origin can break live API calls during browser testing.
